demo: coding-agent-in-the-loop driving the AMK harness (AutoKernel-style: read surface -> propose -> eval -> keep/revert -> record), no algorithmic proposer
driver: Claude (the coding agent) reasoning between each trial; candidates hand-formed from the decode optimization playbook, NOT from the built-in prior/mutation
fitness: CUDA-event median, correctness-gated vs CPU ReferenceVM at the model's native (bf16) tolerance; latency NEVER emitted without a correctness PASS; sub-roofline latencies withheld by the physical-floor guard

trials.decision: kept (1.29x), grounded in lower.py auto-size note
rejected, cp.async SMEM 153600 > 101376 cap; cost-model fallback predicted 87.6us which is BELOW the 695us HBM floor (physically impossible) -> WITHHELD by the floor guard

drift_robust_confirmation.method: 7 interleaved back-to-back A/B rounds (baseline vs best at the same thermal state, cancels WDDM clock drift)

honesty_notes: The drift-robust interleaved median (1.25x) is the number we trust; the single-shot 1.51x was a favorable-thermal-moment reading (both baseline and best latencies drifted UP as the session heated the laptop GPU).
A physically-impossible sub-roofline latency (threads=1024 cost-model fallback, 87.6us < 695us floor) was caught and withheld by a new floor guard, not reported as a win.
Every kept step was correctness-gated (CPU ReferenceVM vs eager, bf16 tolerance); no latency exists without a PASS.
harness_changes_made_to_enable_this: harness.evaluate now threads a reserved kernel_knobs object (cols_per_warp/cpasync/cpa_stages/cpa_cols) to MegakernelVM(knobs=...) so the documented agent surface reaches the real measured headroom (default knobs == byte-identical incumbent).

harness.evaluate now infers the model's native dtype and lowers + gates correctness at that precision (a bf16 model is judged at bf16 tolerance; previously hardcoded fp32 falsely FAILED correct bf16 megakernels).
harness.evaluate now WITHHOLDS any latency below the HBM roofline floor (physically impossible), the same honesty discipline as the correctness gate.
propose()/search_space now document the kernel_knobs sub-surface so an agent reads it.
